BusinessEntityID.description: Identifier for the sales person or business entity associated with the quota.

QuotaDate.description: Date that the sales quota applies to or is recorded for.

SalesQuota.description: Monetary sales target or quota assigned for the given date and salesperson.

rowguid.description: Globally unique identifier (GUID) for the row.

ModifiedDate.description: Timestamp when the record was last modified.

countryregioncode.description: Two-letter code identifying the country or region (ISO-style).

currencycode.description: Three-letter currency code identifying the currency used in the region.

modifieddate.description: Timestamp when this country-region currency mapping was last updated.

currencyrateid.description: Integer primary identifier for an exchange rate record.

currencyratedate.description: Date for which the exchange rate values apply.

fromcurrencycode.description: Three-letter currency code for the source currency being converted from.

tocurrencycode.description: Three-letter currency code for the target currency being converted to.

averagerate.description: Average exchange rate between the source and target currency for the period or date.

endofdayrate.description: Exchange rate observed at the end of the day for the given currency pair and date.

modifieddate.description: Timestamp when the currency rate record was last updated.

productid.description: Unique integer identifier for the product.

NAME.description: Human-readable name or title of the product.

productnumber.description: Manufacturer or internal product number used to identify the item.

makeflag.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the product is manufactured in-house (true) or not (false).

finishedgoodsflag.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the item is a finished good (true) or a component/raw material (false).

color.description: Text value naming the product's color, if applicable.

safetystocklevel.description: Inventory quantity to keep on hand to avoid stockouts.

reorderpoint.description: Inventory level at which new stock should be reordered.

standardcost.description: Standard or expected cost to produce or acquire one unit of the product.

listprice.description: Selling price or list price for one unit of the product.

size.description: Size value for the product, often paired with a size unit code.

sizeunitmeasurecode.description: Code indicating the unit of measure used for the product size (e.g., CM).

weightunitmeasurecode.description: Code indicating the unit of measure used for the product weight (e.g., LB).

weight.description: Numeric weight of the product expressed in the specified weight unit.

daystomanufacture.description: Number of days typically required to manufacture the product.

productline.description: Code or short identifier denoting the product line or family.

class.description: Short code representing the product class or quality grouping.

style.description: Code indicating the style or design family of the product.

sellstartdate.description: Date when the product becomes available for sale.

sellenddate.description: Date when the product is no longer available for sale, if applicable.

discontinueddate.description: Date when the product was officially discontinued, if any.

rowguid.description: Globally unique identifier (GUID) for the product row.

modifieddate.description: Timestamp when the product record was last updated.

productcategoryid.description: Numeric identifier for a product category.

name.description: Human-readable name of the product category, for example 'Bikes' or 'Clothing'.

rowguid.description: Globally unique identifier (GUID) for this row, used for cross-system identity.

modifieddate.description: Timestamp when the product category row was last modified.

productdescriptionid.description: Numeric identifier for a product description record.

description.description: Textual description of a product, often localized and containing marketing or specification details.

rowguid.description: Globally unique identifier (GUID) for this product description row.

modifieddate.description: Timestamp when the product description was last updated.

productmodelid.description: Numeric identifier referencing a product model.

productdescriptionid.description: Numeric identifier referencing a product description entry.

cultureid.description: Two-letter culture or language code indicating the localization of the description (e.g., 'he', 'ar', 'fr').

modifieddate.description: Timestamp when this model-description-culture mapping was last modified.

productreviewid.description: Numeric identifier for a product review.

productid.description: Numeric identifier of the product being reviewed.

reviewername.description: Name of the person who submitted the review.

reviewdate.description: Date and time when the review was posted.

emailaddress.description: Email address provided by the reviewer.

rating.description: Integer rating given by the reviewer, typically on a fixed scale (for example 1–5).

comments.description: Full textual comments or body of the product review.

modifeddate.description: Timestamp indicating when the review record was last modified; may be null and the column name is misspelled.

modifieddate.description: Timestamp indicating when the review record was last modified.

productsubcategoryid.description: Numeric identifier for a product subcategory.

productcategoryid.description: Numeric identifier linking this subcategory to its parent product category.

name.description: Human-readable name of the product subcategory, for example 'Bike Racks' or 'Helmets'.

rowguid.description: Globally unique identifier (GUID) for this subcategory row.

modifieddate.description: Timestamp when the product subcategory row was last modified.

salesorderid.description: Numeric identifier of the sales order that this line item belongs to.

salesorderdetailid.description: Unique numeric identifier for this specific order line item.

carriertrackingnumber.description: Tracking code provided by the shipping carrier for this line item, empty when not assigned.

orderqty.description: Number of units of the product ordered on this line.

productid.description: Numeric identifier of the product ordered on this line.

specialofferid.description: Identifier for any special offer or promotion applied to this line item.

unitprice.description: Price per unit charged on this order line, in the order currency.

unitpricediscount.description: Discount amount applied to the unit price for this line item.

rowguid.description: Globally unique identifier (GUID) for this sales order detail row.

modifieddate.description: Timestamp when this sales order detail row was last modified.

salesorderid.description: Unique numeric identifier for the sales order.

revisionnumber.description: Revision number for the sales order record indicating how many times it has been changed.

orderdate.description: Date and time when the sales order was placed.

duedate.description: Date by which the order is expected or required to be fulfilled.

shipdate.description: Date on which the order was shipped.

STATUS.description: Text code representing the current status of the sales order.

onlineorderflag.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the order was placed online.

purchaseordernumber.description: Customer-supplied purchase order number or external reference for the order.

accountnumber.description: Customer account number used for billing or internal tracking.

customerid.description: Numeric identifier linking the sales order to a customer record.

salespersonid.description: Numeric identifier of the salesperson responsible for the order.

territoryid.description: Identifier for the sales territory or region associated with the order.

billtoaddressid.description: Identifier referencing the address where the customer is billed.

shiptoaddressid.description: Identifier referencing the address to which the order will be shipped.

shipmethodid.description: Identifier of the shipping method used for the order.

creditcardid.description: Identifier for the credit card used to pay the order.

creditcardapprovalcode.description: Approval or authorization code returned by the payment processor for the credit card transaction.

currencyrateid.description: Identifier for the currency exchange rate applied to the order.

subtotal.description: Monetary subtotal of the order before taxes and shipping.

taxamt.description: Monetary amount of tax applied to the order.

freight.description: Monetary shipping or freight charge for the order.

totaldue.description: Total monetary amount due for the order including subtotal, tax, and freight.

comment.description: Free-text comments or notes associated with the order.

rowguid.description: Globally unique identifier (GUID) for the order row.

modifieddate.description: Date and time when the order record was last modified.

businessentityid.description: Identifier of the salesperson's business entity or employee record.

territoryid.description: Identifier for the sales territory assigned to the salesperson.

salesquota.description: Annual sales quota or target amount assigned to the salesperson.

bonus.description: Monetary bonus paid to the salesperson.

commissionpct.description: Commission rate (expressed as a decimal fraction) paid to the salesperson on sales.

salesytd.description: Year-to-date sales amount recorded for the salesperson.

saleslastyear.description: Total sales amount recorded for the salesperson in the previous year.

rowguid.description: Globally unique identifier (GUID) for the salesperson record.

modifieddate.description: Date and time when the salesperson record was last modified.

territoryid.description: Unique numeric identifier for the sales territory.

name.description: Human-readable name of the sales territory or region (e.g., "Southeast", "Germany").

countryregioncode.description: Two-letter country or region code associated with the territory (e.g., US, DE).

group.description: Higher-level geographic group or region that the territory belongs to (e.g., "North America").

salesytd.description: Year-to-date sales amount for the territory.

saleslastyear.description: Total sales amount for the territory during the previous year.

costytd.description: Year-to-date cost or expense recorded for the territory.

costlastyear.description: Total cost or expense recorded for the territory during the previous year.

rowguid.description: Globally unique identifier (GUID/UUID) for this territory record.

modifieddate.description: Timestamp when the territory record was last modified.
